description: Fallback routing — lowest priority. Engine-specific kits override via higher-priority fragments.
_doc-engine-roles: Engine-specific roles (optimizer, environment, validator, shader, ui-developer, game-developer) intentionally excluded from core — provided by engine kit routing fragments (theonekit-unity, theonekit-cocos, theonekit-web, theonekit-rn, theonekit-designer, theonekit-nakama) at priority 90. Removing the default-to-general-purpose stub avoids silent wrong-agent fallback when an engine role keyword fires in a context without an engine kit installed. See #281.
